title: merremia tonkinensis
intro: Merremia tonkinensis, also known as the Vietnamese snail vine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are believed to have therapeutic effects and support overall well-being.
